stamp.title: US 1c Franklin, Continental Bank Note Printing
stamp.summary: 1873 issue, Benjamin Franklin portrait in blue. This example shows the 'secret mark' characteristic of the Continental Bank Note Co. (a small crescent-shaped line in the hair above the ear). Exceptional centering and deep color.

stamp.title: US 1c Franklin, Continental Bank Note Printing
stamp.summary: 1873 issue, Benjamin Franklin portrait in blue. Shows the Continental secret mark. A lighter, slightly grey-blue shade compared to the first specimen. Highly centered margins.
